_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0-of-46 coil statistic and 0% transition accuracy make HOLD the only statistically defensible call — a directional bet here requires the breaker (stablecoin_growth >45 with btc_momentum_30d >55) which has not fired.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst says HOLD with medium conviction; narrative implies UP reversal. The analyst's self-awareness about its 0% transition accuracy overrides the narrative's 0.79 confidence in this coil environment.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth rises above 45 AND btc_momentum_30d sustains above 55
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 65 with VIX above 22 while BTC breaks below $62,000
